value.name: Epic — Business outcome + scope + risks (enterprise standard)
Feature — User value + functional + NFRs + validation
PBI — INVEST story + Given/When/Then AC + DoD checklist
value.descriptionTemplate:
As a {{Persona}}, I want {{Capability}}, so that {{Benefit}}.

## Context
{{Context}}

## Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin — Given/When/Then with optional And)
1) Given {{Given1}}, when {{When1}}, then {{Then1}}
   And {{And1_1}} (optional)
   And {{And1_2}} (optional)
2) Given {{Given2}}, when {{When2}}, then {{Then2}}
   And {{And2_1}} (optional)
   And {{And2_2}} (optional)
3) Given {{NegativeGiven}}, when {{NegativeWhen}}, then {{NegativeThen}} (negative/edge case required)
   And {{NegativeAnd1}} (optional)

## Notes / Constraints
- {{Constraint1}}

## Test Plan
- Unit: {{UnitTestNotes}}
- Integration: {{IntegrationTestNotes}}

## Observability
- Emit event: {{EventName}} (properties: {{EventProperties}})
- Add metric: {{MetricName}} (type: {{MetricType}}; dimensions: {{MetricDimensions}})
- Add trace span: {{SpanName}}

## Definition of Done
- Code reviewed
- Tests added and passing
- Telemetry added and documented
- No secrets added; use Managed Identity / Key Vault
- Documentation updated where applicable

## Decomposition Guardrails
- PBIs should be 1–5 days. If larger, split by independent behavior slices.
- Target: 3–8 PBIs per Feature (hard cap 10). If over cap, merge or defer the lowest priority items.

value.name: PBI — Incident/defect response work item
Epic — Compliance, audit, and governance delivery
Feature — External integration (DevOps/Search/Foundry)
PBI — RAG content curation (golden example or domain standard)
value.descriptionTemplate:
As a {{Role}}, I want to add or update {{RagContentType}} content, so that the generator agents produce consistent, enterprise-ready outputs.

## Content
- Title: {{Title}}
- Type: {{WorkItemTypeOrCategory}}
- Rationale: {{WhyThisHelps}}

## Acceptance Criteria
- Given the content is added, when retrieval runs, then it can be found by a representative query
- Given the content is used, when a work item is generated, then output quality improves (less rework, clearer AC/DoD)

## Definition of Done
- Content reviewed for correctness and no sensitive data
- Seed file updated in source control
- Verification query documented

value.name: PBI — Vertical slice (behavior-first, testable outcome)
